renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for successive one (1) year periods; 90 days written notice for non-renewal.
scope_categories: IT Hardware: End User Computing (laptops, desktops, workstations, monitors, peripherals, docking stations)
IT Hardware: Networking Equipment (switches, routers, access points, cables)
IT Hardware: Data Center Equipment (servers, storage, UPS systems)
IT Software: Licensing (operating systems, productivity suites, security tools, via CDW as authorized reseller)
Related Professional Services: installation, configuration, warranty coordination, and asset disposal
